creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm sorry that we were not able to get to this in a timely fashion. However, there's been a lot of work on the SDHCI driver since FreeBSD 11, and that version left support years ago. Please accept our apologies that the first you heard back from us was cleaning up the bug database and closing this bug. If, by chance, this is still a problem, please file a new bug and cc me (imp@freebsd.org).

Thanks for your understanding.
